items.title: US says it struck Iranian radar sites as Iran targets American forces in Kuwait
items.summary: Iran and the US say they have carried out fresh strikes around the Strait of Hormuz, with Kuwait condemning "repeated" Iranian attacks.

items.title: 3 Teens Win Global Earth Prize for Inventing Tamarind Powder That Easily Removes Microplastics
items.summary: In mid-May, GNN reported that 3 teens from India had won a major continental science prize for their brilliant use of an ingredient in Indian cuisine as the basis for a microplastic filter. Now, from…
